name: Systematic LLM Unavailable Fallback Batch
narrative_summary: Entire source package (11 volumes, 254 chapters) produced zero-confidence LLM unavailable fallback stubs. No narrative content, character dynamics, plot mechanics, world-building elements, reader rewards, or craft observations derivable from provided inputs. All volume_cards report empty state_progression arrays, empty reusable_mechanisms arrays, and zero turning_points recorded. Represents a meta-level distillation artifact documenting complete extraction failure rather than extractable story material.
